PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Dismissal Of Petition For Probate Of Will; Report And Request For Summary Transition To General Administratoin As Special Administrator; Allowance Of Compensation To Special Administrator And Attorney; And Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Pitts appeared via zoom for and with Peter Patterson (petitioner).
David Grizel appeared in person (objector).

Mr. Pitts stated that his client was appointed as special administrator to Marshall the assets, that they do have some bank statements that lead to believe that there is accounts, that there is investment accounts and liquid assets, and that there is a coin collection.

Mr. Grizel stated that the decedent wishes were to leave his vintage BMW vehicle to him, that he had wrote it in his will, and that he never recovered the vehicle.

The Court requested Mr. Grizel file a written objection.

The Court also requested more clarification from Mr. Pitts in a written declaration.

The matters are continued to June 2, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.
